description: Tier rules for the Plures AI Ecosystem Explorer. Tiers: Nascent < Emerging < Established, per dimension and per track. PROVISIONAL until calibrated once on the first full data pull; each threshold then gets a written justification here and freezes until a versioned methodology revision.
calibration_note: Initial values are informed guesses seeded by the 2026-07-22 verification pull (see CONTEXT.md). Do not cite tiers publicly while calibrated=false.

mainstream.comment: t1_share = AI works / total works, rolling 3y, compared to the G20 median share computed within the same snapshot.

frontier.comment: t2 = frontier works since t2_from; t3 = curated orgs + university groups.

attention.comment: Within-country only (GDELT timelinevol is % of the country's monitored coverage; cross-country level comparison is unsound). ratio = mean of last 12 monthly values / mean of prior 12. If A1 data is absent the tier is null with insufficient_data=true - missing is never zero.
